name: Daniel Minich
description: Dano is a telecommunications specialist who lives in Switzerland. He loves hiking and cycling. In life, he focuses intensely on personal growth and happiness. He is goal-oriented, punctual, and knows what he wants from life. He had one serious relationship. His ex-girlfriend is Laura, the winner of the first season of Love Island. Even though their relationship ended because of Love Island, he holds no grudge against Laura. He hopes that Love Island will give him the opportunity to build a new relationship. He is 182cm tall.

name: Dušan Kajaba
description: Dušan is a senior manager of an online store. He comes from Nitra. He does modeling and played American football. With women, he prefers natural beauty and hates smoking. He would describe himself as a goal-oriented optimist who is also a realist. He is 187cm tall.
partner_preferences: women with natural beauty who hates smoking

name: Adéla Šedová
description: Adéla comes from Zlín and studies psychology. She is friendly, loyal, and empathetic. She doesn't seek out conflicts herself, but when it comes to her or her loved ones, she can speak up. Her older sister has been encouraging her to apply for Love Island for several years. She has had only one serious relationship, which lasted four years, but ended with infidelity on the part of her partner. That experience affected her, and she has been single for two years since then. She can fall in love quickly, but she always has some doubts in the back of her mind. In a relationship, loyalty, humor, and understanding are key to her. She doesn't place much emphasis on her partner's appearance, but she always notices a nice smile and teeth. She hates lying. She is a romantic soul who wants to feel loved and safe. Her biggest fear is loneliness. In her free time, she likes to exercise, read, go horseback riding, and take long walks. She is 178cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for honesty, humor, and understanding; notices a nice smile and teeth

name: Daniel Štefan
description: Daniel comes from Velké Popovice, works as a fitness trainer, and his big passion is hockey. In Love Island, he wants to experience something new and most importantly find true love. He has had three serious relationships, but believes this time he will meet the right one. In women, he is immediately drawn to eyes, hair, and smile, but he most values it when she is cute, charismatic, honest, and caring. He is looking for a partner he can rely on and who will want to build a relationship just as much as he does. He doesn't like it when a taken girl flirts with others – for him, devotion is essential. Daniel is competitive, fun, and loyal type who loves sport as well as moments of peace in nature. He believes in love at first sight, but at the same time knows that a real relationship must be carefully built step by step. Daniel is 187cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for a partner who is cute, charismatic, honest, caring, and reliable

name: Lenka Holubová
description: Lenka comes from Prague and works as a dental nurse. She applied for Love Island because she's tired of meeting people through social media. She craves real face-to-face meetings and a love she can talk to from morning till night. She has had two more serious relationships. She is romantic and believes in love at first sight, even though she hasn't experienced it herself yet. Lenka is friendly, empathetic, and a bit stubborn. In men, she is attracted to height, dark hair, facial hair, and a smile. Her dream partner should be kind and accept her for who she is, but also have a bit of a bad boy in him so things don't get boring. She looks for honesty, loyalty, and love in a relationship. She can't stand excessive jealousy and disrespecting women. In relationships, she is tolerant, caring, and can forgive a lot. She spends her free time with her sister and friends. She is 161cm tall.
hobbies: spending time with family and friends
personality_traits: friendly, empathetic, stubborn, romantic, tolerant, caring
partner_preferences: looking for honesty, loyalty, and love; wants a partner who is kind, accepts her for who she is, and has a bit of a bad boy in him

name: Martin Mikuš
description: Martin comes from Hranice, but has been living in Brno for several years and works as a content creator. He enters Love Island with a relaxed attitude. He sees it as an adventure, a new experience, and maybe a path to true love. He has had four more serious relationships, which didn't last, but all ended on friendly terms. He believes in love at first sight, even though he hasn't experienced it yet. He doesn't have a specific type, but eye contact, attraction, and shared interests are important. He is drawn to girls who play sports, have a sense of humor, intelligence, and energy for life. A red flag for him is when a girl drinks too much. Martin is spontaneous, active, and a bit crazy. According to him, a relationship must be based on tolerance, understanding, and open communication. He is looking for a partner who can keep up with him. He is happiest surrounded by people he loves, because he can't stand being alone. He is 184cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for a partner who can keep up with him, has a sense of humor, intelligence, and energy

name: Magdalena Sokhanchak
description: Majda comes from Ukraine, but has been living in the Czech Republic since she was twelve. She works as a beautician, but also handles the role of assistant manager at a jewelry store, does network marketing, and occasionally works as a photo model. Her brother signed her up for Love Island, and Majda decided to try her luck. She has had one serious relationship and even a marriage, which ended after a year. Thanks to this experience, she realized it's important to love herself and not settle for something that doesn't suit her. For her, a relationship stands on trust, attention, humor, and shared energy. In men, she is most drawn to smile and eyes. She likes it when a partner is attentive and has a sense of humor, but she can't stand jealousy and aggression. She herself is sensitive, stubborn, and fair, although at first glance she seems shy. In her free time, she spends time traveling, taking photos, and long walks with family and friends. She is 165cm tall.
hobbies: traveling, photography, walks with family and friends
partner_preferences: looking for an attentive partner with a sense of humor; can't stand jealousy and aggression

name: Daniel Zedníček
description: Daniel comes from Bratislava, is a model and fitness trainer who manages several fields at once, but his heart belongs mainly to sports. He is disciplined, goal-oriented, and at the same time kind – the ideal combination. He has had three more serious relationships that ended without drama. He stays in friendly contact with his ex-girlfriends. He believes that each love taught him something and pushed him further. His ideal is a shorter blonde woman who takes care of herself, is kind, good-hearted, and loving. He doesn't like it when someone acts like a lady on the outside but doesn't behave that way in private. Daniel loves family, traveling, good food, and in his free time he also works on personal development. He is 183cm tall.
hobbies: family, traveling, good food, personal development
partner_preferences: looking for a shorter blonde woman who takes care of herself, is kind, good-hearted, and loving

name: Michaela Cútová
description: Michaela comes from Handlová, studies and works as a barista. At first glance, she might seem tough because of her tattoos, but in reality she is a sensitive and romantic soul. She loves hugs, warm physical contact, and sees herself more as a little princess than a rebel. She has had three more serious relationships. She believes that Love Island will give her a new chance to meet a partner who will be empathetic and become her support. In a relationship, she looks for trust, love, and fidelity. When she sees meaning in love, she is willing to sacrifice everything for it, but at the same time she wants to be a priority for her partner. In men, she always notices hands, broad shoulders, and a nice smile. She doesn't like it when a partner gives her reason to be jealous. She is sensitive, temperamental, and passionate. In her free time, she loves diving, horseback riding, reading, and writing. She is 160cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for an empathetic partner who will become her support; looking for trust, love, and fidelity

name: Nicolas Gašpar
description: Nicolas comes from Banská Bystrica and works as a professional hockey player. Sports are his life, but he comes to Love Island for a new experience and mainly to find true love. He has had three serious relationships and now believes it's the right time to meet the right one. In women, he is mainly charmed by smile and energy. It doesn't matter if she's a brunette or blonde, what matters is that she is smiley, nice, and that they get along. He doesn't like indifference and negativity. Nicolas is energetic, competitive, and full of vigor. He loves all kinds of sports, likes traveling, and is happiest in the company of his friends. Although he has a fear of heights and is afraid of failure, he never gives up and goes hard after what he wants. He is 184cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for a smiley, nice woman he can get along with; can't stand indifference and negativity

name: Sára Ružičková
description: Sára comes from Bratislava and works as a photo model and bartender. She is temperamental, fun, and ambitious – simply a force who won't get lost in any company. Although at first glance she seems like a party animal, she also has a sensitive soul that has been through a difficult life experience. She has had one more serious relationship. She goes to Love Island with hope to meet a man who is empathetic, fun, and temperamental enough to be able to handle her. First of all, she notices details, like clean nails and a beautiful smile. She doesn't like it when a partner is jealous and indifferent. In a relationship, she looks for communication, honesty, and empathy. She most likes to spend time dancing and with friends who know her as a happy and talkative girl. She is 172cm tall.
personality_traits: temperamental, fun, ambitious, sensitive soul, happy, talkative
partner_preferences: looking for an empathetic, fun, and temperamental man; looking for communication, honesty, and empathy

name: Thanh Tung Cao
description: Tung comes from Opava, but currently lives in London, where he fully dedicates himself to stunt work, acting, and modeling. He is a brave fighter who knows what he wants in life – whether on set or in love. He has had one serious relationship, but believes the right chemistry is still waiting for him. On a first date, he puts a lot of weight on energy and first impression. He can be charmed by a nice smile and positive mood. His dream woman should be a sporty type, full of humor, goal-oriented, and also organized. Simply someone who knows how to take care of herself and her lifestyle. Tung is 175cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for a sporty woman full of humor, goal-oriented and organized

name: Patricie Herlíková
description: Patricie comes from Prague and works as an assistant at an aesthetic medicine clinic. She was drawn to Love Island by the desire to try something new, meet interesting people, and maybe finally find love. She has had two more serious relationships. Patricie is determined to find a man who is funny, emotionally available, and makes her feel like she matters to him. According to her, a relationship must be based on respect, trust, and mutual understanding. At first glance, she is drawn to smile and teeth. She likes it when a partner is attentive, can make her laugh, and wants to share deeper topics with her. She can't stand lies and emotional unavailability. She herself is open, talkative, energetic, and knows how to show when she likes someone. She spends her free time with her French bulldog and goes to pilates. She is 176cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for a funny, emotionally available man who makes her feel important; wants respect, trust, and mutual understanding

name: Jakub Gášek
description: Jakub comes from Uherské Hradiště and works as a buyer. He is goal-oriented, dedicated, and does everything with passion, whether it's work, sports, or cooking, which is among his big hobbies. He likes meeting new people and seeks intense experiences, because he believes life should be lived to the fullest. He has had two serious relationships and is now ready to find a partner with whom he will get along not only in love, but also in life pace. He is drawn to blondes with athletic build, but goal-orientedness and empathy are just as important to him. In a relationship, he looks for fidelity, energy, and passion for common things. He is 182cm tall.
hobbies: cooking, sports, meeting new people, intense experiences
partner_preferences: looking for a blonde with athletic build, goal-orientation and empathy; looking for fidelity, energy, and passion in a relationship

name: Jan Michálek
description: Honzi is one of the leading Czech influencers who loves traveling, adventure, and fun with friends. He is funny and always ready for new experiences. Besides that, he likes to play computer games and at home he is kept company by a little dog. He has had three relationships and believes in love at first sight. First, he notices hair on a girl, and his type is both blondes and brunettes. He would like a partner who can calm him down. On the other hand, he can't stand smoking because he wants a relationship built on a healthy and positive lifestyle. Honzi is heartfelt, energetic, and now is ready to find the right one with whom he can share not only traveling, but also his everyday world. He is 184cm tall.
hobbies: traveling, adventure, computer games, fun with friends
partner_preferences: looking for a partner who can calm him down; can't stand smoking, wants relationship built on healthy lifestyle

name: Jan Pešek (Honza)
description: Honza comes from České Budějovice and works as a fitness trainer. He is positive, energetic, but at the same time an introvert. That's exactly why he sees Love Island as a challenge and a chance to get to know himself better. He has had three serious relationships and now longs for a partner with whom he can talk openly about everything, find compromises, and support each other. His type is a small brunette who shares similar interests and life drive. On the other hand, he doesn't want a jealous and offensive nature. Honza loves traveling, working out, and good food. He is 192cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for a small brunette with similar interests and life drive; doesn't want a jealous and offensive nature

name: Michelle Ptašinská
description: Michelle comes from Ostrava and works as a tour guide. She is energetic, spontaneous, and likes to spread good mood. She goes to Love Island because she thinks it's time to find love already. She has had three more serious relationships, and each time it was with a foreigner. The reason for breaking up was always the distance that separated them. In a relationship, trust is most important to her. She would like a confident, charismatic, and responsible partner who feels like a real man. She admits that looks matter to her. At first glance, she notices posture and whether charisma radiates from a man. Michelle believes in love at first sight, even though she knows it doesn't always work out. In her free time, she loves surfing, sunbathing, traveling, and shopping. She is 170cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for a confident, charismatic, and responsible man who feels like a real man

name: Erika Teichertová
description: Erika comes from Ostrava and works as a model. She is nice, spontaneous, and in life she follows her strong feminine intuition. Although she hasn't met true love yet, she has had two more serious relationships. In a relationship, trust, communication, and humor are key to her – preferably the ironic kind. She can fall in love quickly, and in men she first notices eyes and smile. She would never forgive infidelity and doesn't like promiscuous behavior. Erika spends most of her time with family, friends, and her dog. She is 175cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for trust, communication, and humor; can't stand infidelity and promiscuous behavior

name: Simona Galková
description: Simi comes from Nitra and studies economics university. Besides that, she is a dancer, so appearing in public is natural for her. She describes herself as fun, goal-oriented, and talkative. She believes Love Island is the right place where she has a chance to get to know someone fully. She has had one serious relationship, which ended due to different personalities. She believes in love at first sight, but in a relationship she requires trust and loyalty. She admits she is a bit jealous. Her type? Either a tattooed brunette or a blonde with blue eyes. In both cases, he must be goal-oriented and ambitious. She notices smile the most. In her free time, she dedicates herself to dancing, working out, makeup, and social media. She is 170cm tall.
hobbies: dancing, working out, makeup, social media
partner_preferences: looking for a tattooed brunette or a blonde with blue eyes, goal-oriented and ambitious

name: Ivan Janiš
description: Ivan comes from Banská Bystrica and works as a barber. He says about himself that he is confident, goal-oriented, and action-oriented. He comes to Love Island with an open heart, but also clear principles. He has had two serious relationships that ended due to different personalities. He has never been unfaithful and says that with him it doesn't even threaten. When he loves, he loves fully. He imagines a relationship as a strong partnership based on honesty, love, and fidelity. His ideal woman should have the right combination of angel and devil in her. At first glance, he notices eyes and lips. In his free time, he dedicates himself to weightlifting and combat sports. He is a romantic with firm principles who believes in love at first sight, but at the same time knows that a real relationship must be built. He is 194cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for a woman with a combination of angel and devil; wants honesty, love, and fidelity

name: Tomáš Lomáz
description: Shelby comes from a small village in the Dolní Kubín district and works as a barber. He describes himself as sophisticated, fun, and honest. In the last years, he mainly focused on work, so there was no time for relationships. Love Island is an opportunity to break away from everyday routine, experience something new, and maybe finally meet the right one. He has had three serious relationships and now is looking for a partner who is goal-oriented, honest, and won't lack humor. He likes more delicate types of women, but at the same time women who know what they want. At first glance, he is always drawn to the overall energy a woman radiates. Shelby is a sports enthusiast, loves music, and comes to the villa with an open mind and heart. He is 184cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for a goal-oriented, honest woman with humor; likes delicate types who know what they want

name: Leona Součková
description: Lea is a twenty-four-year-old tabloid journalist who comes from Kladna, but has been living in Prague for a few years. She runs a café in the center with her mother. She applied for Love Island because she watches reality shows every year for work and is also single. With her extroverted nature, she immediately attracts her surroundings. Although she knows how to use her attractiveness to her advantage, in love she is more careful now. in life She believes that on Love Island she will meet a man who will become her partner and with whom she can be herself. She likes to spend her free time with family and friends. She is 164cm tall.

name: Klaudia Németová
description: Klaudia is a twenty-five-year-old content creator and receptionist who comes from Košice but lives in Bratislava. She is the type of woman who never gets lost in a crowd – she is funny, energetic, and isn't afraid to be the center of attention. She likes partying, flirting, and living life to the fullest. She studied abroad, where she spent most of her time. Therefore, she didn't have an opportunity to form a serious relationship. Although she believes she can find a partner on Love Island, she is mainly looking forward to new experiences and friendships. She is 157cm tall.
hobbies: flirting, living life to the fullest, new experiences, friendships
personality_traits: funny, energetic, isn't afraid to be center of attention

name: Gabriela Jandová
description: Gabriela is a primary school teacher and comes from České Budějovice. She is empathetic, kind, and loving, which makes her an ideal candidate for a long-term relationship. She is not a flirty woman, and a partner will really have to earn her. She loves sports, especially football, which she probably inherited from her father, a former footballer. On Love Island, she is ready to step out of her comfort zone. She is 165cm tall.
partner_preferences: partner will really have to earn her

name: Dominika Horáková
description: Dominika is a fitness trainer from Prague who has more than 77,000 followers on Instagram. She is extroverted, open, and used to sharing her life on social media. She knows what she wants and goes for it. She brings energy to Love Island that no one can overlook. She has had three serious relationships that failed because of communication. Her future另一半 should be honest, funny, and ambitious. She is 170cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for an honest, funny, and ambitious man

name: Julie Palečková
description: Julie is a university student who comes from Prague. In a relationship, she expects that a man will be able to provide for her, pamper her, and give her a sense of security. Her jealous nature could bring a good dose of drama and tension to the villa. Julie met men mainly through social networks or in bars, but hasn't found the right one yet. She comes to Love Island with a clear goal – to win Daniel's heart. She is 175cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for a man who will provide for her, pamper her, and give her a sense of security

name: Peter Čurgali
description: Peter alias Čurgi is a barber who comes from Prešov. He is the type of man who naturally attracts women looking for a protector and reliable partner. He is ready to do maximum for his partner and future family – to take care of them, provide for them, and create a safe home. In return, however, he expects only one thing – absolute fidelity and devotion. This friendly barber comes to the villa with a clear goal: to find the love of his life with whom he could start a traditional family. Inspired by the strong relationship of his parents, he believes he will also find a partner with whom he can experience a lifelong marriage. He is 190cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for absolute fidelity and devotion; wants to start a traditional family

name: Jan Bedeč
description: Jan alias Bedy is a sales manager who comes from Jeseník. He would describe himself as action-oriented, funny, and responsible. He has a competitive spirit and is ready to do anything in the villa to get the woman of his dreams. Bedy is looking for a partner who shares his passion for sports and an active lifestyle. He believes he will find a girl in the villa who has similar energy and appetite for new challenges. His two previous relationships failed precisely because his ex-girlfriends couldn't keep up with his adrenaline lifestyle. He is 181cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for a partner with the same passion for sports and active lifestyle, similar energy and appetite for new challenges

name: Tomáš Ždímal
description: Tomáš is a presenter who comes from Chrudim. He makes a calm, attractive, and friendly impression. That helps him attract the opposite sex like a magnet. Tomáš is a family type and a natural choice for women who are looking for stability and potential for a long-term relationship. As a presenter, he is used to being the center of attention and taking things into his own hands, but at the same time he is ready to let himself be carried away by events in the villa. Tomáš enters the show with a clear goal – to find love for a whole life. He is 184cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for stability and long-term relationship

name: Jan Fischer
description: Jan is an IT guy and boxing coach who comes from Ústí nad Labem. He would describe himself as stubborn, ambitious, and mysterious. He doesn't hide his enthusiasm for numerology and psychology and comes to Love Island with the goal of getting to know himself and others better. Jan had two serious relationships, with the last one ending just two months ago. Now he believes that on the island he will find a temperamental girl who will make his heart race. He is 195cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for a temperamental woman

name: Kristian Majid
description: Kristian is a professional footballer who comes from Prague. He describes himself as ambitious, goal-oriented, and funny. Unlike his teammates, he is not looking for one-night stands, but something real and lasting. Pakistani blood runs in his veins, and his temper shows when things don't go his way. He has been single for two years because he fully dedicated himself to his career, but now he is ready to open his heart and find his missing second half. He is 188cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for something real and lasting, not one-night stands

name: David Kremeň
description: David comes from Miroslavi near Znojmo and works as a police officer. He says about himself that he is friendly, a family type, and a big joker who likes to laugh. He goes to Love Island because he already feels that outside he has exhausted all possibilities to find love. He has had four serious relationships, with the longest lasting four years. In the past, he even once forgave infidelity, but today he is not sure if he could do it again. His ideal? He doesn't have a dream type, but he wants a partner who can represent him not only in appearance but also in behavior. She should like sports just like him, whether it's hiking, swimming, or the gym. At first glance, he notices eyes and smile. David values trust, respect, and communication. He is 186cm tall.
partner_preferences: wants a partner who can represent him in appearance and behavior; she likes sports (hiking, swimming, gym)

name: Klára Kořáňová
description: Fighter from Karlovy Vary! Klára went through a difficult period after a car accident in which she suffered serious injuries. But instead of breaking her, she found even greater strength and desire to enjoy life to the fullest. Today, she appreciates every moment, loves sports and new adventures. This confident and energetic woman has a weakness for younger men and believes that on Love Island she will meet someone who can keep up with her – whether in training or in love. She is 172cm tall.
partner_preferences: looking for someone who can keep up with her in training and love; has a weakness for younger men

name: Adriana Krištofová
description: Adri is an office manager from Prague. She belongs to the women who radiate nobility and natural elegance. Her exceptional energy and charm fascinate every man she meets. She usually appears gentle and calm, but at the right moment she can also show her fiery side. She loves horses and used to do horseback riding competitively. After six months of single life, she comes to Love Island to find a man who won't give her reason to be jealous, will be her real support and partner in good times and bad. She is 173cm tall.
personality_traits: gentle, calm, fiery, noble, elegant, energetic, charming
partner_preferences: looking for a man who won't give her reason to be jealous, will be her real support and partner in good times and bad

name: Kristína Vargová
description: Kika works as a content creator and comes from Košice. She is social, smiley, and loves an active lifestyle. In winter, she enjoys skiing the most, which brings her a feeling of endless freedom and adrenaline. Outside the season, she regularly maintains her fitness at the gym. Her big passion is makeup, which for her is not just a daily routine, but also a way to express creativity, attention to detail, and personal style. Kika is a former participant of the Slovak reality show Bachelor, from which she withdrew when she saw more chemistry between the groom and her friend. She comes to Love Island ready to get to know all the men in the villa, but she already has her secret favorite.
